title: Caamembeca autranii

The Polygalaceae family is part of the order Polygalales, which consists of flowering plants that are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. Within the Polygalaceae family, Caamembeca autranii belongs to the genus Caamembeca, which is a genus of flowering plants native to South America. The classification of Caamembeca autranii into the Polygalaceae family is based on its morphological characteristics, such as its compound leaves and small, yellowish flowers. Further classification into the Caamembeca genus is based on its distinct floral and foliar features.
